title: CHAIN OF CUSTODY
description: Break the chain of custody and you break justice itself. Evidence doesn't lie — but evidence can disappear. This track follows the forensic trail from collection to courtroom. Pillar 3 — Evidence Integrity. 🔗 fairgojustice.com.au #ChainOfCustody #ForensicEvidence #FairGoJustice
tags: chain of custody, forensic evidence, evidence tampering, pillar 3, australian courts, evidence integrity

title: BUILT THE ROADS PAID THE PRICE
description: They built this country with their hands. Roads. Bridges. Homes. And when they needed the system to protect them, it wasn't there. Working class stories don't make the news — but they make this music. 🔗 fairgojustice.com.au #WorkingClass #AustralianCountry #FairGoJustice

title: CAVEAT OVER HOME
